findings.title: TRACE Method Detected via Nmap
findings.description: Nmap http-methods script detected TRACE as a supported HTTP method. TRACE enables Cross-Site Tracing (XST) attacks and should be disabled.

evidence.observed:
Supported Methods: OPTIONS HEAD GET POST TRACE
  Potentially risky methods: TRACE

findings.recommendation: Review and apply hardening via Ansible.

  Potentially risky methods: TRACE

findings.title: Self-Signed TLS Certificate Detected
findings.description: The TLS certificate on port 443 is self-signed (subject and issuer both 'vm-apache'). Self-signed certificates are not trusted by browsers and indicate missing CA-signed deployment.
findings.recommendation: Review and apply hardening via Ansible.

rule_meta.title: TLS Certificate Trust or Validity Failure

evidence_entries.observed:
cert_trust: certificate does not match supplied URI
cert_chain_of_trust: failed (self signed).
cert_extlifeSpan: 3650 days
cert_revocation: Neither CRL nor OCSP URI provided
